# meraki_networks_moves (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Networks Moves` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_networks_moves" "example" {
  organization_id = "123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID

### Read-Only

- `network_id` (String) ID of the network to move
- `organizations_target_id` (String) ID of the organization to which the network is moving
- `simulate` (Boolean) If true, simulates the network move and validates the operation without committing changes. The network will remain in the source organization.
